description: Comprehensive Keycloak monitoring dashboard using Prometheus metrics. Covers HTTP requests, authentication, token operations, JVM memory, threads, and database connection pool.
title: Keycloak Monitoring (Prometheus)

d396e2e1-83d7-41ac-8a15-4881278fd102.name: namespace
d396e2e1-83d7-41ac-8a15-4881278fd102.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%keycloak%'

34077934-8d6c-4b7c-9a9a-263b24ae3a04.name: job
34077934-8d6c-4b7c-9a9a-263b24ae3a04.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'job'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%keycloak%'

b2d0b990-36be-489f-8c6f-efe385ee34a3.name: instance
b2d0b990-36be-489f-8c6f-efe385ee34a3.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'instance'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%keycloak%'

promql.name: A
promql.query: 100 * sum(jvm_memory_used_bytes{job="$job", instance="$instance", area="heap"}) / sum(jvm_memory_max_bytes{job="$job", instance="$instance", area="heap"})
